title: Kanbus clock: header id prefix one step lighter
description:
Goal:
- Make header ID prefix one Radix step lighter than base header text (not as light as attention).

Acceptance:
- ID prefix color = band step 8 when base is step 7.
- Issue type/status remain at base (or attention where specified).
- Applies to all card types.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting: adjust header ID prefix color to Radix step 8 in Python + React; update tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Update: header ID prefix now uses Radix step 8 (base+1) in Python + React. Added header_id_color param to comment-like scenes; React KanbusCard idColor uses band step 8. Added test for id prefix color. Tests: uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (39 passed). Ready for visual check.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Live demo sequence: transition, comment, transition
